allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('sonner:', deps.get\('sonner','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('eslint-plugin-jest:', deps.get\('eslint-plugin-jest','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('jest:', deps.get\('jest','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('vitest:', deps.get\('vitest','NOT FOUND'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/eslint-plugin-jest/package.json'\); console.log\('eslint-plugin-jest version:', p.version\); const peer = p.peerDependencies; console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(peer,null,2\)\)")
